prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约9945名、10019名、12733名、15678名、17940名，呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约8000名，2025年基准位次约17940名；该校在山东省招生计划2021–2023年均为90人，2024年扩至95人，2025年进一步扩至102人；2026年计划为99人，较2025年缩招3人（约-2.9%），小幅缩招对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国政法大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第56名，属于政法类顶尖院校，法学学科全国第一；抖音学校热度总排名第6（高热），2022年排名第4、2024年排名第5，短视频曝光量极高；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（涉及早年校园安全事件），但整体关注度仍处高位，报考热度不减；法学为A+学科（全国唯一），与招生专业高度关联；政治学、社会学等学科亦有较强实力，法学相关实验班（涉外法治、法学改革实验班等）吸引力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业2024年热度评估为"分化观望"，较2023年有所降温但仍属偏热；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约5.7%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招（-2.9%）对竞争略有缓解、山东省考生规模扩大（+5.7%）加剧竞争、学校抖音高热及法学A+的持续吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准17940名附近小幅波动，整体竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约17823名，区间17323–18323名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间17323–18323名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档法学类专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如17000名以内）可重点冲刺法学各实验班及法学普通班；位次接近区间上限（如18000名以上）应以二档专业为主，谨慎冲刺一档。法学A+学科全国顶尖，就业前景广阔，但竞争激烈，需结合个人兴趣与职业规划选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 9945, 10019, 12733, 15678, and 17940, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8000 positions in the past 3 years, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 17940; the university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province was 90 students from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 95 in 2024, and further expanded to 102 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 99 students, a reduction of 3 students (about -2.9%) compared to 2025, and the slight reduction slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Political Science and Law is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, a top political and legal institution, with the law discipline ranked first nationally; Douyin school popularity total ranking 6th (high heat), ranked 4th in 2022 and 5th in 2024, with extremely high short video exposure; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving early campus safety incidents), but overall attention remains high, and application enthusiasm does not diminish; law is an A+ discipline (the only one in the country), highly related to the admissions majors; political science, sociology, and other disciplines also have strong strength, and law-related experimental classes (such as foreign-related rule of law, law reform experimental classes, etc.) are particularly attractive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the law major in 2024 is assessed as 'differentiated wait-and-see', which has cooled compared to 2023 but is still relatively hot; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from 681,000 in 2025, and the expansion of the candidate scale intensifies competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (-2.9%) slightly eases competition, the expansion of Shandong Province candidate scale (+5.7%) intensifies competition, the high Douyin heat of the school and the sustained attractiveness of law A+, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will fluctuate slightly around the 2025 baseline of 17940, with overall competition slightly intensifying; the predicted minimum ranking is about 17823, with a range of 17323 to 18323.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 17323 to 18323, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 law majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 17000), focus on reaching for various law experimental classes and regular law classes; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 18000), mainly fill in Tier 2 majors and cautiously reach for Tier 1. The law A+ discipline is top in the country with broad employment prospects, but competition is fierce, so personal interests and career plans should be considered.
